title: FizzBuzz
description: Print the FizzBuzz sequence from 1 to n, one entry per line.
io: stdin is a single integer n; stdout is n lines where line i (for i from 1 to n) is "FizzBuzz" if i is divisible by 15, else "Fizz" if divisible by 3, else "Buzz" if divisible by 5, else the number i itself. n=0 produces no output.

cases.stdout:
1
2
Fizz
4
Buzz
Fizz
7
8
Fizz
Buzz
11
Fizz
13
14
FizzBuzz
